race.comment: MORTHAN EFFICIENT (6) progressed nicely last start when he did his best work late to finish a close third over 2200m at Donald after missing the placings at the previous appearance. Race looks to have fallen in his lap after a couple of keys scratchings. WARCHIME (1) raced below his best last time when sixth over 2000m at Ballarat, beaten 3.5 lengths, but has the talent to return to form back in grade here. LUCKETT (3) progressed nicely last time out to finish just 1.3 lengths from QUITE THE LASS and that form looks pretty good now after QUITE THE LASS was narrowly beaten at Pakenham last night. THINK YOUR AMAZING (4) has only had the two starts but looks to have more upside than most of them. The form from the maiden win was franked to a degree last weekend when the horse he beat, Shotaro, broke its maiden in style.
